title: Russifier JC
description: Russifier for the Jujutsu Craft mod and some plugins
body:
A resource pack created for Russification of game content, as well as audio replicas of characters for the [**Jujutsu Craft**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sorceryfight) mod and some plug-ins for this mod.



Mod Link: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sorceryfight 

Creator Link: https://www.curseforge.com/members/orca_san_/projects


----[RU]----

Ресурс-пак, созданный для русификации игрового контента, а также аудио-реплик персонажей для мода [**Jujutsu Craft**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sorceryfight) и некоторых плагинов к данному моду.
